equipment.title: Rational SCC 101 Combi Oven
equipment.description: Excellent condition Rational SCC 101 combi oven with 10 x 1/1 GN capacity. Fully serviced with new door seal and deep cleaned. SelfCookingCenter with humidity control, core temperature probe included. Ideal for restaurants, hotels and catering operations.
equipment.dimensions: 850 x 771 x 757 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: PizzaMaster PM 435 Conveyor Pizza Oven
equipment.description: PizzaMaster PM 435 conveyor pizza oven in good working order. 14-inch belt width, ideal for busy pizza shops and takeaways. Recently serviced with new conveyor belt. Gas powered with electronic ignition.
equipment.dimensions: 1200 x 850 x 450 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: Williams HA280SA Undercounter Fridge
equipment.description: Williams HA280SA undercounter fridge with two doors. Stainless steel exterior, GN compatible shelving. Good condition, runs perfectly. Ideal for prep kitchens and bar areas.
equipment.dimensions: 1360 x 700 x 850 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: Winterhalter GS502 Pass-Through Dishwasher
equipment.description: Winterhalter GS502 pass-through dishwasher. Excellent condition, fully refurbished with new wash arms and filters. 500 x 500mm basket size. Includes tabling and tabling can be sold separately.
equipment.dimensions: 1420 x 750 x 1920 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: La Marzocco Linea PB 2 Group Espresso Machine
equipment.description: Stunning La Marzocco Linea PB 2 group espresso machine. Excellent cosmetic and working condition. Recently serviced with new group gaskets and shower screens. Includes portafilters and tamper. A centrepiece for any specialty coffee shop.
equipment.dimensions: 810 x 530 x 470 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: Lincat DF66 Twin Tank Fryer
equipment.description: Lincat DF66 twin tank electric fryer. Good working condition. Two 6-litre tanks with individual thermostatic controls. Stainless steel construction. Perfect for fish and chips shops or pub kitchens.
equipment.dimensions: 400 x 620 x 330 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: Unox XEVC-0711-EPR Combi Oven
equipment.description: Unox XEVC-0711-EPR 7-tray combi oven with programmable controls and automatic washing. Good condition with some cosmetic wear. Fully functional, ideal for bakeries and restaurants.
equipment.dimensions: 790 x 775 x 750 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: Foster EP1442H Double Door Upright Fridge
equipment.description: Foster EP1442H double door upright fridge. Excellent condition, energy efficient hydrocarbon refrigerant. 1300 litre capacity with adjustable shelving. Perfect for commercial kitchens requiring large cold storage.
equipment.dimensions: 1440 x 830 x 2030 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: Spiral Mixer 50L Dough Mixer
equipment.description: 50 litre spiral dough mixer in good working condition. Two speeds, timer function, stainless steel bowl and spiral hook. Ideal for bakeries and pizzerias producing fresh dough daily.
equipment.dimensions: 600 x 900 x 1100 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: Blue Seal Evolution G514D Chargrill
equipment.description: Blue Seal Evolution G514D chargrill with four burners and adjustable griddle plate. Good condition, recently cleaned and tested. Cast iron griddle surface. Perfect for steakhouses and grill menus.
equipment.dimensions: 900 x 600 x 400 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: Robot Coupe CL50 Vegetable Prep Machine
equipment.description: Robot Coupe CL50 vegetable preparation machine with multiple discs included. Excellent condition. High output continuous feed design. Essential for busy prep kitchens.
equipment.dimensions: 350 x 350 x 550 mm (W x D x H)

equipment.title: Middleby Marshall PS360G Conveyor Oven
equipment.description: Middleby Marshall PS360G conveyor oven — the industry standard for pizza and sandwich toasting. Good condition, gas powered with adjustable speed and temperature controls. 18-inch wide belt.
equipment.dimensions: 1400 x 900 x 500 mm (W x D x H)
